message:
fix: wire FormatDescription hook in doPush, add GenerateID/FormatDescription tests

Self-review found two issues:
1. FormatDescription was declared in PushHooks but never called in doPush.
   Now applied to a shallow copy before CreateIssue/UpdateIssue to avoid
   mutating local data.
2. GenerateID hook had no test coverage. Added tests for both success and
   error (collision) cases, plus FormatDescription test that verifies
   local issue is not mutated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
